title: Classic Toast
description: A very simple mod. Make the toast appear vertically. Just like in the old version.
body: Classic Toast is a lightweight client-side mod designed specifically for players who miss the classic vertical display style of Toast notifications in older versions of Minecraft. If you're like me and want toasts to appear vertically again, this should satisfy you. Since Nostalgic Tweaks doesn't include this feature, I created this very simple mod.
